expectedTools.name: warehouse.search
expectedTools.description: Search curated tools, frameworks, SDKs, stacks, and repo patterns.

output.matches: array of tool summaries with verdicts, categories, alternatives, and rationale

expectedTools.name: warehouse.get_tool
expectedTools.description: Return full curated entry for a specific tool slug.

expectedTools.name: warehouse.compare_tools
expectedTools.description: Compare tools by use case, maturity, cost, lock-in, and alternatives.

expectedTools.name: warehouse.recommend_stack
expectedTools.description: Recommend a full app/system stack using curated warehouse entries.

output.stack: recommended stack with alternatives and tradeoffs

expectedTools.name: warehouse.record_usage
expectedTools.description: Record real usage evidence so research verdicts can become used-once or shipped-to-prod.

kernelUsage: project planning must query warehouse before recommending unfamiliar tools
template selection should include warehouse alternatives when confidence is low
post-project review should update usage evidence
MCP tools must preserve external-action approval boundaries
